text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm pretty sure I'm pushin' it way too far...
keeping my pulse up this long...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Pant... How's my time?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Pant... One more set...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Let's do this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur and I hit the pool for some early
training this morning in an effort to push her
cardiovascular system.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's time. I'll leave you to tidy up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I realize that I forgot to give her some
details concerning her upcoming interview, so I
decide to drop by her classroom.
choice_data_list: (I'm also curious to see what she's like in class.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I said it's completely meaningless to even talk
about this "Takashi" character. Leave me out of
it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"In five minutes, Takashi manages to catch up
with his brother walking 5.6 kilometers ahead."
...It's ridiculous. They just slapped a name on
there for the hell of it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not here to talk about Takashi himself. I want
to talk about turning his feat into a reality.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you and I join forces, we just might be able to
crack the formula for enabling a human to run at
sixty-seven kilometers an hour.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I might be able to use this in my race research!
The possibilities have my heart racing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You agree, don't you, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Don't hang me out to dr—oh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Shakur, someone's here to see you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'll leave all that up to you. Go ahead and
give the reporters some data if you need to.
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll take care of it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And by the way, I think this is the kind of thing
you could have just messaged me on LANE about.
choice_data_list: I was in the area anyway.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I bet you really just wanted to see what Shakur's
like off the track, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I knew it. You're actually quite interested in her,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't you introduce all of your
friends, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you already know, but I'm Agnes
Tachyon. And this here is Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hello.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon, who loves running experiments,
and Manhattan Cafe, an Umamusume with a
mysterious aura. Both of them are runners with
bright futures ahead of them.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We haven't debuted yet, but I'm sure one of us
will probably be up against Shakur at some point.
...Of course, I can't say for sure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Shakur spends every day surrounded by
wonderful friends like me and Cafe here, laughing
and having a grand old time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, you two?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's all you needed, right? You can leave now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what I could see, Air Shakur seems right at
home in class. I feel like I caught a tiny glimpse of
her ordinary side.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh sorry. You just looked so happy, it was
infectious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is studying abroad here as a
dignitary from Ireland. Her family apparently
comes from the royal line of another land. I
occasionally see her together with Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It seems like there's something fun on your mind.
Would you mind sharing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I see. That Tachyon sure is a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Although their fields of specialty are different, it
always looks like Shakur is enjoying herself when
she's having a complicated discussion with
Tachyon.
choice_data_list:
Now you mention it... I guess she did look
happy. Kinda.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Well, if you say so then it must be right!
choice_data_list: I'm still only just her trainer, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I haven't learned anything more about Shakur
since we first met. All she seems to be hoping for
from our relationship is that I might provide some
"unquantifiable influence."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sure... but that's only for now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to know what she said to me the
first time I spoke to her? "Get the hell away from
me!"

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She looked me right in the eyes and said she
wanted nothing to do with me. She rejected me
outright with both her attitude and her words.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It was so refreshing I couldn't help but be happy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's a certain elegance about roundabout
expressions and the consideration behind them.
However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shakur showed me her real self. Her thoughts,
words, and body language were all in complete
alignment.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's why I'd like to be as honest as I can as well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I never want to doubt myself or the way I
ought to be.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I believe that if I do what I must, the two of us will
see eye-to-eye one day.
choice_data_list: If you do what you must, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: When I'm with Shakur, I feel it all the more.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What is it I want to do? What is it I ought to do?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Let's keep our little chat today a secret from
Shakur, okay?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll just get angry at me for filling your
head with nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Security Officer
text_block_list.text: Your Highness. I think it's about time we go.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Very well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's chat again sometime! Take care, now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's words echo in my mind. I should
probably think more about the things I ought to
be doing as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You were speaking to Fine, right? I could see the
two of you looking awful chummy from all the way
down the hall.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So, what nonsense did the little princess fill your
head with?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Did I say somethin' funny? Spit it out, right now!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Now I'm positive she's been talkin' her usual
crap.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And as for you, do you really have time to be
goofin' around?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We don't even have seven centimeters of room to
spare. Maybe instead of runnin' your mouth, how
about you start runnin' your brain?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I already told you I'm willing to take any
advantage I can get, even if it's some
unquantifiable influence.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That goes for your ideas too. I expect practically nothing from you, but I'd still rather have almost nothing than nothing at all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So get thinking. Unless you like just being here
for show, that is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has never once called my existence
unnecessary. That means that there must still be a
role for me to play as her trainer.
choice_data_list: Thank you! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You don't have to get so excited.
